headline: What a top-tier data center market looks like, according to Bernstein
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts at Bernstein are out with a note describing three types of data center market types in the U.S., and highlighting stocks building or buying in the top markets, even as investors have expressed concerns over power delays, community pushback and supply chain constraints surrounding data center buildouts.
